name: Mid Shield Gardna
name_jp: ミドル・シールド・ガードナー
desc: Once per turn, you can flip this card into face-down Defense Position. Negate the activation of any Spell Card that targets this 1 face-down monster. At that time, flip this card into face-up Defense Position.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, you can flip this card into face-down Defense Position. Negate the activation of any Spell Card that targets this 1 face-down monster. At that time, flip this card into face-up Defense Position.
eff: Once per turn, you can flip this card into face-down Defense Position. Negate the activation of any Spell Card that targets this 1 face-down monster. At that time, flip this card into face-up Defense Position.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the activation of Spell Cards
